parameters.query:
-- Fetch recent users (< 60 days old) with their drip state + ICP data
WITH recent_users AS (
  SELECT
    au.id AS user_id,
    au.email,
    au.created_at AS signup_at,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - au.created_at)) / 86400 AS days_since_signup,
    ucp.onboarding_completed_at,
    CASE WHEN ucp.onboarding_completed_at IS NOT NULL
      THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ucp.onboarding_completed_at)) / 86400
      ELSE NULL
    END AS days_since_onboarding,
    COALESCE(ucp.department, 'other') AS department,
    COALESCE(ucp.job_title, '') AS job_title,
    snap.has_snapshots
  FROM auth.users au
  LEFT JOIN public.user_company_profiles ucp ON ucp.user_id = au.id
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM diff_tracker.page_snapshots ps JOIN core.tracked_pages tp ON tp.id = ps.tracked_page_id WHERE tp.user_id = au.id) AS has_snapshots) snap ON true
  WHERE au.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days'
    AND au.email IS NOT NULL
),
user_drips AS (
  SELECT user_id, ARRAY_AGG(drip_key) AS sent_drips
  FROM public.onboarding_drip_log
  GROUP BY user_id
),
user_packets AS (
  SELECT user_id, MIN(created_at) AS first_packet_at
  FROM control_plane.packets
  WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  ru.user_id,
  ru.email,
  ru.signup_at,
  ru.days_since_signup,
  ru.onboarding_completed_at,
  ru.days_since_onboarding,
  ru.department,
  ru.job_title,
  COALESCE(ud.sent_drips, ARRAY[]::text[]) AS sent_drips,
  up.first_packet_at,
  CASE WHEN up.first_packet_at IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS has_packet,
  ru.has_snapshots,
  EXTRACT(DOW FROM NOW()) AS day_of_week
FROM recent_users ru
LEFT JOIN user_drips ud ON ud.user_id = ru.user_id
LEFT JOIN user_packets up ON up.user_id = ru.user_id
ORDER BY ru.signup_at;
